text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days after the tryouts, I'm walking around town when I find...

text_block_list.name: Freestyle Race Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Hey you! Any interest in watching some freestyle races? We've got
some real fire bouts lined up over in the alley today!

text_block_list.name: Freestyle Race Staff A
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Series is cool and all, but freestyle races are just as
exciting!
Oh, you there! Miss Umamusume! You should check this out too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Freestyle, huh?
Whoa, hey! Look who it is!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Mhmm, yeah. Just warming up for some training, and thinking about
what you said the other day about a style that suits me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But yeah, this freestyle thing? I've always known about it, but I've
never actually watched a race in-person...

text_block_list.name: Freestyle Race Staff A
text_block_list.text:
You both seem pretty interested! Knew it! Just come on over here,
then! Feel free to join a race at any time if you want, too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Freestyle racing is popular among amateur Umamusume who want to
run unbound by rules and norms. They're often held in empty lots
rented for the very purpose.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some runners prefer these kinds of races over going pro, no matter
how fast they may be. They compete as their hearts desire in front of
a great many fans.

text_block_list.name: Freestyle Race Spectators
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Freestyle Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Haaa!
Uooogh!
I'm number one around here! Haaa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With so many rowdy, rough-and-tumble running styles at play,
freestyle is plenty different to watching Twinkle Series races. The
competitive spirit on display is quite moving in its own way!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
This feels totally different from all those official races... So this is
freestyle...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Incredible... Like, just watching 'em gets me so pumped!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
...!
Yeah... Yeah, think I do!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, mind if I join in? Or I can wait for the next one, doesn't
matter to me!

text_block_list.name: Eyebrowless Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh, newbie lookin' to jump in? Love the enthusiasm. Sure, come on
over. What's your name?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Uh, Palmer! It's uh, Mejiro Palmer.

text_block_list.name: Tongue-pierced Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh, a Mejiro eh? Looks like we got a celeb on our hands. Name's
kinda long though, so how about we just call you Palmer? Oh yeah,
we'll draw straws to determine gate numbers before the race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Uh, okay? So just "Palmer" is fine?

text_block_list.name: Tongue-pierced Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yeah? No way people'll remember a name that long. Might not even
remember the short version if ya don't win...

text_block_list.name: Eyebrowless Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Don't think too hard about it. Just gotta win, yeah? It's all about
strength and runnin' your own way in the freestyle world. Let's go,
Palmer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh! Yeah, lookin' forward to it!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And they're off! In the lead, we have a first-time entrant, number two
in the red tracksuit! Can she keep it up?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Okay, calm down, and let's do this like always...)

text_block_list.name: Determined Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Hraaagh! Y'all better stop screwin' around if you wanna win!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Oh yikes, now that's some fierce running! Kinda incredible to see it up close!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Maybe I should try out... something like that? I mean... no better
chance than a race like this!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(And right now I'm just newbie number two in the red tracksuit. I'm not
a Mejiro—I'm Palmer!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Win or lose, I'm not a Mejiro!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Tch! Haaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Fast, she's fast! Number two Palmer takes first! That speed was
actually crazy! She wins by six whole lengths!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Dang, how did I... This is way too much fun!

text_block_list.name: Eyebrowless Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Whoa whoa whoa, where the hell did that come from? That got me all
fired up! Let's go again, Palmer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Okay, sure thing! Wanted to run some more anyways! Kinda wanna
tear up the track until there's nothin' left!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Haaa!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(My legs just won't stop! And this breeze feels great! It feels like I'm
moving my body in a way that I can give my all!)

text_block_list.name: Tongue-pierced Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Oh, look at her go! She's kinda like, stupidly fast. Hm?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... Heh, crap! Might've gotten a little too wild...

text_block_list.name: Tongue-pierced Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Pfft, hahaha! Now she's flounderin'! Don't tell me you didn't think this through? Haha, now that's too funny!

text_block_list.name: Freestyle Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Palmer! Go! Run like hell!
You're somethin' else, Palmer! Smash that finish!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Okay, you got it! This time, I'll run like never before! Watch me snatch
the win and burn this run into your memories!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hraaagh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By the time all of the freestyle races scheduled for the day are over,
the frenzy surrounding Mejiro Palmer has reached its peak.

text_block_list.name: Freestyle Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Paaal-mer! Paaal-mer! Paaal-mer! Paaal-mer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wow, everyone's so fired up... Hehe, and seriously, for me? I don't
think I've ever heard my name called out so much...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'm SO hyped up right now!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Phew... My head's still spinning from all that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Right? That's the first time that's ever happened to me. Nothing like
that tryout race, for sure. People who didn't even know that I'm a
Mejiro were cheering my name!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
High-key, that felt so, so awesome! I wanna keep doing that from
here on out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Yeah! I want everyone to know my name! To spread the word
of "Mejiro Palmer" far and wide!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes are positively dazzling. I can see that she's finally found her
dream and her calling. And without a second thought...
choice_data_list:
Seems you've got a dream. Can I help make it
come true?

Seems you've got a dream. Can I help make it
come true?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, so are you like, scouting me? For real?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'm beyond stoked. So yeah, let's do this thing, Trainer!
